# This is a Revit shared parameter file.
# Do not edit manually.
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# STING ISO 6412 Symbol Family — Shared Parameter Contract
# Version : 1.0   Date : 2026-05-17
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# PURPOSE
#   Load this file into every ISO 6412 Detail Item family in this folder
#   (Family Editor → Manage → Shared Parameters → Browse…).
#   Bind all parameters listed below as INSTANCE parameters.
#   A family that carries these parameters unlocks:
#     • Scale-aware linework (Symbol Scale)
#     • Idempotent re-placement (STING_PLACED_BY_SYMBOL_PLACER_BOOL)
#     • Audit trail and undo (STING_PLACER_ASSY_ID_TXT, …MEMBER_ID…, …SYMBOL_CODE…)
#     • Finalization gate checked by BuildSeedFamiliesCommand
#       (STING_FINALIZATION_CHECKLIST)
#   Missing parameters are logged as warnings; placement continues but
#   features degrade (duplicates may accumulate on re-run, scale will not
#   auto-adjust).
#
# BINDING INSTRUCTIONS
#   1.  Open the .rfa in the Family Editor.
#   2.  Manage → Shared Parameters → Browse… → select this file.
#   3.  For each parameter in Group 1 (STING - ISO 6412 Symbols):
#         Add → check "Instance" → OK.
#   4.  Do NOT bind as Type parameters — the placer writes per-instance.
#   5.  Save and reload into the target project.
#
# FINALIZATION GATE
#   Set STING_FINALIZATION_CHECKLIST = 1 only after:
#     □  Detail linework centred at origin and passes 1:25 + 1:50 plot test
#     □  Symbol Scale parameter present and controlling linework size formula
#     □  All placement-stamp parameters added as instance shared params
#     □  Family loads into a blank project without warnings
#     □  Family name matches CSV family_filename column exactly (inc. case)
#   Families with STING_FINALIZATION_CHECKLIST = 0 (or absent) are flagged
#   by BuildSeedFamiliesCommand as incomplete and excluded from bundle exports.
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
*META	VERSION	MINVERSION
META	2	1
*GROUP	ID	NAME
GROUP	1	STING - ISO 6412 Symbols
*PARAM	GUID	NAME	DATATYPE	DATACATEGORY	GROUP	VISIBLE	DESCRIPTION	USERMODIFIABLE	HIDEWHENNOVALUE
PARAM	d4e7f3a1-8b2c-4d5e-9f0a-1b2c3d4e5f6a	Symbol Scale	INTEGER		1	1	View scale denominator (50 for 1:50). Controls linework size formulae. Default 50. Written by IsoSymbolPlacer.PlaceSymbols() at placement time.	1	0
PARAM	a1b2c3d4-e5f6-4a7b-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d	STING_PLACED_BY_SYMBOL_PLACER_BOOL	INTEGER		1	1	Set to 1 by IsoSymbolPlacer after successful placement. Required for NewOnly idempotency checks and Replace-mode purge. Set to 0 in family template.	1	0
PARAM	b2c3d4e5-f6a7-4b8c-9d0e-1f2a3b4c5d6e	STING_PLACER_ASSY_ID_TXT	TEXT		1	1	ElementId of the owning AssemblyInstance as a string. Written by placer. Used in audit CSV and undo bundle.	1	0
PARAM	c3d4e5f6-a7b8-4c9d-0e1f-2a3b4c5d6e7f	STING_PLACER_MEMBER_ID_TXT	TEXT		1	1	ElementId of the source MEP member (pipe / duct / conduit / fitting). Key for NewOnly duplicate detection.	1	0
PARAM	d4e5f6a7-b8c9-4d0e-1f2a-3b4c5d6e7f8a	STING_PLACER_SYMBOL_CODE_TXT	TEXT		1	1	CSV symbol_code that resolved to this family (e.g. ELBOW_90_BW). Surfaced in the fabrication result dialog and audit trail.	1	0
PARAM	e5f6a7b8-c9d0-4e1f-2a3b-4c5d6e7f8a9b	STING_ISO_SYMBOL_SCALE_IN	NUMBER		1	1	STING-namespaced mirror of Symbol Scale as a Double. Use in linework formulae where Integer parameters cannot be referenced directly in some formula contexts.	1	0
PARAM	f6a7b8c9-d0e1-4f2a-3b4c-5d6e7f8a9b0c	STING_FINALIZATION_CHECKLIST	INTEGER		1	1	Author sets to 1 when all checklist items in README.md are complete. BuildSeedFamiliesCommand rejects families where this equals 0.	1	0
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# LINEWORK SIZE FORMULA PATTERN
#   Add a Length family parameter named e.g. "Detail Line Length" and set
#   its formula to:
#
#     Detail Line Length = STING_ISO_SYMBOL_SCALE_IN / 50 * 8 mm
#
#   This keeps plotted size constant at 8 mm at 1:50, 8 mm at 1:25, etc.
#   Replace 8 mm with the appropriate dimension for each line segment.
#   The Integer parameter "Symbol Scale" cannot be used directly in formulae
#   in older Family template versions — use the NUMBER mirror instead.
#
#   Alternative pattern (Revit 2025+, Integer formula support):
#
#     Detail Line Length = Symbol Scale / 50 * 8 mm
#
# SCALE TIER CONVENTION
#   Symbol Scale value  → Plotted size target
#   ─────────────────────────────────────────
#   ≤ 25                → 6 mm  (large-scale detail)
#   26 – 50             → 8 mm  (standard spool / section)
#   51 – 100            → 6 mm  (reduced for medium drawings)
#   > 100               → 4 mm  (diagram / small scale)
#
#   IsoSymbolPlacer sets Symbol Scale = view.Scale at placement.
#   For a DraftingView (SLD / diagram) the placer uses scale = 1 so
#   families intended for SLD drafting views must author at scale = 1.
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# PARAMETER GROUP SUMMARY
#
# GROUP 1  —  STING - ISO 6412 Symbols
#   Symbol Scale                         INTEGER  default=50  (controls sizing)
#   STING_PLACED_BY_SYMBOL_PLACER_BOOL   INTEGER  default=0   (idempotency)
#   STING_PLACER_ASSY_ID_TXT             TEXT     default=""  (audit)
#   STING_PLACER_MEMBER_ID_TXT           TEXT     default=""  (audit / dup check)
#   STING_PLACER_SYMBOL_CODE_TXT         TEXT     default=""  (audit)
#   STING_ISO_SYMBOL_SCALE_IN            NUMBER   default=50  (formula mirror)
#   STING_FINALIZATION_CHECKLIST         INTEGER  default=0   (gate)
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
